title: Mr Juicy — Burger Restaurant
description: Bold, neo-brutalist landing page for a premium burger restaurant in San Antonio, TX. Features animated hero, scrolling marquee, menu cards, testimonials, and location info.
long_description: A full-featured restaurant landing page for Mr Juicy, a premium burger spot in San Antonio. The design uses a neo-brutalist style with chunky borders, solid-color offset shadows, and a lime green + charcoal color palette. Includes animated floating burger hero, infinite-scroll marquee, featured menu cards with hover effects, split-layout about section with community stats, customer testimonials, dual location cards, and a catering/merch extras section.
